recommendations.title: Dum Laga Ke Haisha
recommendations.overview: A slim uneducated guy is pressured into an arranged marriage with an overweight college girl. The mismatched couple is challenged to compete in the annual wife-carrying race.

recommendations.title: Now Is Good
recommendations.overview: A girl dying of leukemia compiles a list of things she'd like to do before passing away. Topping the list is her desire to lose her virginity.

recommendations.title: College
recommendations.overview: A wild weekend is in store for three high school seniors who visit a local college campus as prospective freshmen.

recommendations.title: Naomi and Ely's No Kiss List
recommendations.overview: The bonds between Naomi and Ely are tested when they fall for the same guy.

recommendations.title: National Lampoon Presents Dorm Daze
recommendations.overview: When a foreign-exchange student and a hooker - both named Dominique - show up on a college campus, the unsuspecting student body is in for the education of a lifetime!

recommendations.title: All About Them
recommendations.overview: Charlotte is cheating on Micha with Mélodie. Not suspecting a thing, yet feeling neglected, Micha in turn cheats on Charlotte.  But also with Mélodie. For Mélodie, things are topsy-turvy. She lies to both of them. She is privy to each of their lies.

recommendations.title: Don't Think Twice
recommendations.overview: An improv group deals with several crises, including the loss of their lease and one member hitting the big time.

recommendations.title: An Almost Ordinary Summer
recommendations.overview: Two families meet for a marriage that neither want, and things take a turn when the respective patriarchs fall in love.

recommendations.title: The F**k-It List
recommendations.overview: After a prank blows up a studious high school senior's life, he shares a list of certain things he wishes he'd done differently — and maybe still can.

recommendations.title: The Feels
recommendations.overview: A lesbian bachelorette weekend goes awry when one of the brides admits she's never had an orgasm.
